nasb.text: It is He who reveals the profound and hidden things; He knows what is in the darkness, And the light dwells with Him.

esv.text: he reveals deep and hidden things; he knows what is in the darkness, and the light dwells with him.

cnv.text: 他顯明深奧和隱密的事， 他洞悉暗中的一切， 因為光明與他同住。

ccb.text: 祂显明深奥隐秘之事， 洞悉暗中的隐情， 有光与祂同住。
